rationale: Escalation type is 'blocked' on a missing credential — STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET for the test-mode webhook secret. This is an external fact (Stripe Dashboard > Developers > Webhooks) that requires operator action to provision. Braintree equivalents exist in 1Password 'shared-eng' vault but no Stripe entry was ever created. The Executor has confirmed signature verification code is written and unit tests pass with mocked signature; the only gap is the real test-mode secret. This is outside arbitration authority — no directive or plan amendment can substitute for the credential itself.
